content.rendered:
How It Started

This project began with a call from a small but growing real estate lending firm based in Florida. Slow Flip Lenders specializes in helping investors and homebuyers secure fast capital with flexible terms, especially for flips and short-term opportunities.

Before we stepped in, their digital presence was almost nonexistent. No site, no clear brand message, and no lead capture system. They were relying solely on word-of-mouth and offline connections.

They needed a simple, professional site that explained what they do—and made it easy for borrowers to get started.

Project Overview

The client’s goals were clear:

  • Establish legitimacy online with a professional, trustworthy website
  • Explain their niche loan offerings in plain language
  • Collect borrower information quickly and route it to the right team member
  • Stand out from the sea of generic financial sites

We built everything from scratch—from brand visuals to copy to an automated intake system.

What We Did

Phase 1: Website Design & Messaging

  • Designed a clean, professional layout with real estate visuals
  • Wrote all copy focused on speed, simplicity, and trust
  • Highlighted their unique advantage: slow flip terms and personalized service
  • Designed call-to-actions (“Get Pre-Approved,” “See Loan Options”) that drive conversions
  • Created a lightweight funnel for each loan type

Phase 2: SmartForm™ Integration

  • Installed our signature SmartForm™ to collect borrower info
  • Used conditional logic to segment leads by loan type and urgency
  • Set up email automations to notify the Slow Flip team instantly
  • Ensured submissions were trackable and stored securely

Phase 3: Google Optimization & SEO

  • Claimed and optimized their Google Business Profile
  • Added schema and metadata for SEO visibility
  • Wrote core landing page content with local keyword targeting
  • Configured site analytics for tracking visitor behavior and submission rates

Real Improvements

  • A full lead funnel built from the ground up in under 3 weeks
  • Site now ranks for terms like “fix and flip loan Palm Beach” and “short-term real estate financing”
  • SmartForm submissions are organized and auto-tagged for faster response
  • The client now has a fully automated inbound lead process
  • Credibility increased with a polished web presence tailored to their niche

Final CTA

This is what we love doing—taking a solid business with offline momentum and giving them the online systems to match.

If you’re in a specialized space like lending, real estate, or finance, we can help build a site that works as hard as you do.

👉 Book a free strategy call or view our portfolio to get started.

excerpt.rendered: We helped Slow Flip Lenders build a full lead funnel from scratch, complete with SmartForms, local SEO, and a clean website that speaks directly to real estate investors looking for fast, flexible capital.
